title: Register Open Social Web Handle
description: Enter your Open Social Web handle to register for Activity Intents. This will allow you to share content from this forum to your social profile.
register-error: Failed to register handle. Please check the handle format and try again.
invalid-handle: Please enter a valid handle in the format @username@domain.com
trigger-description: Please log in to your forum account, or choose an Open Social Web handle to complete this action
trigger-no-matching: No registered handles support this intent. Register a new handle or log in.
